# 参考资料 {.unnumbered}


---

## 图片来源 {.unnumbered}

本书所有示意图均来自 [维基媒体共享资源（Wikimedia Commons）](https://commons.wikimedia.org/)，遵循相应的开放授权协议（CC BY-SA / CC0 / 公共领域）。

| 章节 | 图片描述 | 来源 |
|------|----------|------|
| 第一节·数据库与格式 | DNA 分子结构与碱基对配对 | 图片引用自维基百科：[DNA](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/DNA) |
| 第一节·数据库与格式 | Phred 质量分数系统与质量控制 | 图片引用自维基百科：[Phred quality score](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Phred_quality_score) |
| 第一节·数据库与格式 | DNA 测序技术原理 | 图片引用自维基百科：[DNA sequencing](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/DNA_sequencing) |
| 第一节·数据库与格式 | 基因组注释与基因结构 | 图片引用自维基百科：[Gene annotation](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Gene_annotation) |
| 第二节·高通量测序 | 凝胶电泳装置 | 图片引用自维基百科：[Gel electrophoresis](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Gel_electrophoresis) |
| 第二节·高通量测序 | Sanger 链终止法原理图 | 图片引用自维基百科：[Sanger sequencing](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Sanger_sequencing) |
| 第二节·高通量测序 | PCR 循环示意图 | 图片引用自维基百科：[Polymerase chain reaction](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Polymerase_chain_reaction) |
| 第二节·高通量测序 | 基因组文库构建流程图 | 图片引用自维基百科：[Genomic library](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Genomic_library) |
| 第二节·高通量测序 | Illumina 桥式扩增/簇生成图 | 图片引用自维基百科：[Illumina dye sequencing](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Illumina_dye_sequencing) |
| 第二节·高通量测序 | Phred 质量分数与峰图 | 图片引用自维基百科：[Phred quality score](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Phred_quality_score) |
| 第二节·高通量测序 | PacBio SMRT Cell | 图片引用自维基百科：[Single-molecule real-time sequencing](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Single-molecule_real-time_sequencing) |
| 第二节·高通量测序 | Nanopore 测序原理图 | 图片引用自维基百科：[Nanopore sequencing](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Nanopore_sequencing) |
| 第三节·Linux | Linux 吉祥物 Tux | 图片引用自维基百科：[Linux](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Linux) |
| 第三节·Linux | Bash 命令行界面截图 | 图片引用自维基百科：[Command-line interface](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Command-line_interface) |
| 第三节·Linux | Unix 创始人 Ken Thompson 与 Dennis Ritchie | 图片引用自维基百科：[Unix philosophy](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Unix_philosophy) |
| 第三节·Linux | Linux 文件系统层级结构截图 | 图片引用自维基百科：[Filesystem Hierarchy Standard](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Filesystem_Hierarchy_Standard) |
| 第三节·Linux | Unix 管道示意图 | 图片引用自维基百科：[Pipeline (Unix)](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Pipeline_(Unix)) |
| 第三节·Linux | SSH 数据包结构图 | 图片引用自维基百科：[Secure Shell](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Secure_Shell) |
| 第四节·R与Python | Python 编程语言徽标 | 图片引用自维基百科：[Python (programming language)](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Python_(programming_language)) |
| 第四节·R与Python | R 编程语言徽标 | 图片引用自维基百科：[R (programming language)](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/R_(programming_language)) |
| 第四节·R与Python | Jupyter 项目徽标 | 图片引用自维基百科：[Project Jupyter](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Project_Jupyter) |
| 第四节·R与Python | Git 版本控制系统徽标 | 图片引用自维基百科：[Git](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Git) |
| 第四节·R与Python | Docker 容器化工具截图 | 图片引用自维基百科：[Docker (software)](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Docker_(software)) |
| 第三节·变异检测·专题3 | 全基因组关联分析曼哈顿图 | 图片引用自维基百科：[Genome-wide association study](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Genome-wide_association_study) |
| 第三节·变异检测·专题3 | 连锁不平衡热图（LD Heatmap） | 图片引用自维基百科：[Linkage disequilibrium](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Linkage_disequilibrium) |
| 第三节·变异检测·专题3 | 哈迪-温伯格平衡图解 | 图片引用自维基百科：[Hardy–Weinberg principle](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Hardy%E2%80%93Weinberg_principle) |
| 第三节·变异检测·专题3 | 主成分分析示意图（用于群体分层控制） | 图片引用自维基百科：[Principal component analysis](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Principal_component_analysis) |
| 第三节·变异检测·专题3 | 非洲人群基因型 PCA 散点图（群体分层示意） | 图片引用自维基百科：[Population stratification](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Population_stratification) |
| 转录组学·专题4·功能富集分析 | Gene Ontology 项目标志 | 图片引用自维基百科：[Gene ontology](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Gene_ontology) |
| 转录组学·专题4·功能富集分析 | GSEA 算法模块化流程示意图 | 图片引用自维基百科：[Gene set enrichment analysis](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Gene_set_enrichment_analysis) |
| 转录组学·专题5·WGCNA | 层次聚类树状图（动态树切割） | 图片引用自维基百科：[Hierarchical clustering](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Hierarchical_clustering) |
| 转录组学·专题5·可变多腺苷酸化 | 可变多腺苷酸化（APA）示意图 | 图片引用自维基百科：[Polyadenylation](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Polyadenylation) |
| 转录组学·专题5·可变多腺苷酸化 | 尼罗河流量变化点检测示例 | 图片引用自维基百科：[Change detection](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Change_detection) |
| 转录组学·专题5.4·方程辨识 | 反问题（inverse problem）示意图 | 图片引用自维基百科：[Inverse problem](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Inverse_problem) |
| 转录组学·专题5.5·Regulon 思想 | 调控子（Regulon）结构示意图 | 图片引用自维基百科：[Regulon](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Regulon) |
| 单细胞基础·专题6.1·10x 上游 | 液滴微流控芯片示意图 | 图片引用自维基百科：[Microfluidics](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Microfluidics) |
| 单细胞基础·专题6.1·空液滴过滤 | 曲线膝点（拐点）示意图 | 图片引用自维基百科：[Knee of a curve](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Knee_of_a_curve) |
| 单细胞基础·专题6.2·质量控制 | 质量控制概念示意图 | 图片引用自维基百科：[Quality control](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Quality_control) |
| 单细胞基础·专题6.3·降维 | 主成分分析示意图 | 图片引用自维基百科：[Principal component analysis](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Principal_component_analysis) |
| 单细胞基础·专题6.3·可视化 | 非线性降维（UMAP/t-SNE）示意图 | 图片引用自维基百科：[Nonlinear dimensionality reduction](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Nonlinear_dimensionality_reduction) |
| 单细胞基础·专题6.4·Visium | 空间转录组学技术示意图 | 图片引用自维基百科：[Spatial transcriptomics](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Spatial_transcriptomics) |
| 单细胞基础·专题6.5·空间分析 | 空间自相关分析示意图 | 图片引用自维基百科：[Spatial analysis](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Spatial_analysis) |
| 单细胞高级·专题7.1·跨样本整合 | 批次效应示意图 | 图片引用自维基百科：[Batch effect](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Batch_effect) |
| 单细胞高级·专题7.1·差异丰度 | 组成数据单纯形示意图 | 图片引用自维基百科：[Compositional data](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Compositional_data) |
| 单细胞高级·专题7.2·拟时序 | 细胞分化潜能（Cell potency） | 图片引用自维基百科：[Cell potency](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Cell_potency) |
| 单细胞高级·专题7.2·拟时序 | 细胞分化层级示意图 | 图片引用自维基百科：[Cellular differentiation](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Cellular_differentiation) |
| 单细胞高级·专题7.2·RNA Velocity | RNA 剪接过程示意图 | 图片引用自维基百科：[RNA splicing](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/RNA_splicing) |
| 单细胞高级·专题7.2·RNA Velocity | RNA velocity 速率流场示意 | 图片引用自维基百科：[RNA velocity](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/RNA_velocity) |
| 单细胞高级·专题7.3·细胞通讯 | 细胞信号转导示意图 | 图片引用自维基百科：[Cell signaling](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Cell_signaling) |
| 单细胞高级·专题7.3·基因调控网络 | 基因调控网络示意图 | 图片引用自维基百科：[Gene regulatory network](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Gene_regulatory_network) |
| 单细胞高级·专题7.4·CITE-seq | 单细胞测序技术示意图 | 图片引用自维基百科：[Single-cell sequencing](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Single-cell_sequencing) |
| 单细胞高级·专题7.4·scATAC | ATAC-seq 转座酶插入原理图 | 图片引用自维基百科：[ATAC-seq](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ATAC-seq) |
| 单细胞高级·专题7.5·空间解卷积 | 空间转录组学技术示意图 | 图片引用自维基百科：[Spatial transcriptomics](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Spatial_transcriptomics) |
| 单细胞高级·专题7.5·MERFISH | 荧光原位杂交（FISH）原理图 | 图片引用自维基百科：[Fluorescence in situ hybridization](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Fluorescence_in_situ_hybridization) |

---

## 参考文献 {.unnumbered}

Aibar, S., González-Blas, C. B., Moerman, T., Huynh-Thu, V. A., Imrichova, H., Hulselmans, G., et al. (2017). SCENIC: Single-cell regulatory network inference and clustering. *Nature Methods*, 14(11), 1083–1086. https://doi.org/10.1038/nmeth.4463

Aran, D., Looney, A. P., Liu, L., Wu, E., Fong, V., Hsu, A., et al. (2019). Reference-based analysis of lung single-cell sequencing reveals a transitional profibrotic macrophage. *Nature Immunology*, 20(2), 163–172. https://doi.org/10.1038/s41590-018-0276-y

Bergen, V., Lange, M., Peidli, S., Wolf, F. A., & Theis, F. J. (2020). Generalizing RNA velocity to transient cell states through dynamical modeling. *Nature Biotechnology*, 38(12), 1408–1414. https://doi.org/10.1038/s41587-020-0591-3

Cable, D. M., Murray, E., Zou, L. S., Goeva, A., Macosko, E. Z., Chen, F., & Irizarry, R. A. (2022). Robust decomposition of cell type mixtures in spatial transcriptomics. *Nature Biotechnology*, 40(4), 517–526. https://doi.org/10.1038/s41587-021-00830-w

Chen, K. H., Boettiger, A. N., Moffitt, J. R., Wang, S., & Zhuang, X. (2015). Spatially resolved, highly multiplexed RNA profiling in single cells. *Science*, 348(6233), aaa6090. https://doi.org/10.1126/science.aaa6090

Crowell, H. L., Soneson, C., Germain, P.-L., Calini, D., Collin, L., Raposo, C., et al. (2020). muscat detects subpopulation-specific state transitions from multi-sample multi-condition single-cell transcriptomics data. *Nature Communications*, 11, 6077. https://doi.org/10.1038/s41467-020-19894-4

Dann, E., Henderson, N. C., Teichmann, S. A., Morgan, M. D., & Marioni, J. C. (2022). Differential abundance testing on single-cell data using k-nearest neighbor graphs. *Nature Biotechnology*, 40(2), 245–253. https://doi.org/10.1038/s41587-021-01033-z

Hafemeister, C., & Satija, R. (2019). Normalization and variance stabilization of single-cell RNA-seq data using regularized negative binomial regression. *Genome Biology*, 20, 296. https://doi.org/10.1186/s13059-019-1874-1

Hao, Y., Hao, S., Andersen-Nissen, E., Mauck, W. M., Zheng, S., Butler, A., et al. (2021). Integrated analysis of multimodal single-cell data. *Cell*, 184(13), 3573–3587. https://doi.org/10.1016/j.cell.2021.04.048

Huynh-Thu, V. A., & Geurts, P. (2018). dynGENIE3: Dynamical GENIE3 for the inference of gene networks from time series expression data. *Scientific Reports*, 8, 3384. https://doi.org/10.1038/s41598-018-21715-0

Jin, S., Guerrero-Juarez, C. F., Zhang, L., Chang, I., Ramos, R., Kuan, C.-H., et al. (2021). Inference and analysis of cell-cell communication using CellChat. *Nature Communications*, 12, 1088. https://doi.org/10.1038/s41467-021-21246-9

Kang, H. M., Subramaniam, M., Targ, S., Nguyen, M., Maliskova, L., McCarthy, E., et al. (2018). Multiplexed droplet single-cell RNA-sequencing using natural genetic variation. *Nature Biotechnology*, 36(1), 89–94. https://doi.org/10.1038/nbt.4042

Kleshchevnikov, V., Shmatko, A., Dann, E., Aivazidis, A., King, H. W., Li, T., et al. (2022). Cell2location maps fine-grained cell types in spatial transcriptomics. *Nature Biotechnology*, 40(5), 661–671. https://doi.org/10.1038/s41587-021-01139-4

Korsunsky, I., Millard, N., Fan, J., Slowikowski, K., Zhang, F., Wei, K., et al. (2019). Fast, sensitive and accurate integration of single-cell data with Harmony. *Nature Methods*, 16(12), 1289–1296. https://doi.org/10.1038/s41592-019-0619-0

La Manno, G., Soldatov, R., Zeisel, A., Braun, E., Hochgerner, H., Petukhov, V., et al. (2018). RNA velocity of single cells. *Nature*, 560(7719), 494–498. https://doi.org/10.1038/s41586-018-0414-6

Lopez, R., Regier, J., Cole, M. B., Jordan, M. I., & Yosef, N. (2018). Deep generative modeling for single-cell transcriptomics. *Nature Methods*, 15(12), 1053–1058. https://doi.org/10.1038/s41592-018-0229-2

Lu, T., Liang, H., Li, H., & Wu, H. (2011). High-dimensional ODEs coupled with mixed-effects modeling techniques for dynamic gene regulatory network identification. *Journal of the American Statistical Association*, 106(496), 1242–1258. https://doi.org/10.1198/jasa.2011.ap10194

Meister, A., Li, Y. H., Choi, B., & Wong, W. H. (2013). Learning a nonlinear dynamical system model of gene regulation: A perturbed steady-state approach. *The Annals of Applied Statistics*, 7(3), 1311–1333. https://doi.org/10.1214/13-AOAS645

Schep, A. N., Wu, B., Buenrostro, J. D., & Greenleaf, W. J. (2017). chromVAR: Inferring transcription-factor-associated accessibility from single-cell epigenomic data. *Nature Methods*, 14(10), 975–978. https://doi.org/10.1038/nmeth.4401

Squair, J. W., Gautier, M., Kathe, C., Anderson, M. A., James, N. D., Hutson, T. H., et al. (2021). Confronting false discoveries in single-cell differential expression. *Nature Communications*, 12, 5692. https://doi.org/10.1038/s41467-021-25960-2

Stoeckius, M., Hafemeister, C., Stephenson, W., Houck-Loomis, B., Chattopadhyay, P. K., Swerdlow, H., et al. (2017). Simultaneous epitope and transcriptome measurement in single cells. *Nature Methods*, 14(9), 865–868. https://doi.org/10.1038/nmeth.4380

Stringer, C., Wang, T., Michaelos, M., & Pachitariu, M. (2021). Cellpose: A generalist algorithm for cellular segmentation. *Nature Methods*, 18(1), 100–106. https://doi.org/10.1038/s41592-020-01018-x

Stuart, T., Srivastava, A., Madad, S., Lareau, C. A., & Satija, R. (2021). Single-cell chromatin state analysis with Signac. *Nature Methods*, 18(11), 1333–1341. https://doi.org/10.1038/s41592-021-01282-5

Svensson, V., Teichmann, S. A., & Stegle, O. (2018). SpatialDE: Identification of spatially variable genes. *Nature Methods*, 15(5), 343–346. https://doi.org/10.1038/nmeth.4636

Van de Sande, B., Flerin, C., Davie, K., De Waegeneer, M., Hulselmans, G., Aibar, S., et al. (2020). A scalable SCENIC workflow for single-cell gene regulatory network analysis. *Nature Protocols*, 15(7), 2247–2276. https://doi.org/10.1038/s41596-020-0336-2

Varah, J. M. (1982). A spline least squares method for numerical parameter estimation in differential equations. *SIAM Journal on Scientific and Statistical Computing*, 3(1), 28–46. https://doi.org/10.1137/0903003

Wu, H., Lu, T., Xue, H., & Liang, H. (2014). Sparse additive ordinary differential equations for dynamic gene regulatory network modeling. *Journal of the American Statistical Association*, 109(506), 700–716. https://doi.org/10.1080/01621459.2013.859617

Zhao, E., Stone, M. R., Ren, X., Guenthoer, J., Smythe, K. S., Pulliam, T., et al. (2021). Spatial transcriptomics at subspot resolution with BayesSpace. *Nature Biotechnology*, 39(11), 1375–1384. https://doi.org/10.1038/s41587-021-00935-2

::: {#refs}
:::
